scripts.build: esbuild tools/boxplot.jsx tools/bargraph.jsx tools/scatter.jsx tools/aequorin.jsx tools/venn.jsx tools/molarity.jsx tools/power.jsx --outdir=tools --jsx=transform
scripts.watch: esbuild tools/boxplot.jsx tools/bargraph.jsx tools/scatter.jsx tools/aequorin.jsx tools/venn.jsx tools/molarity.jsx tools/power.jsx --outdir=tools --jsx=transform --watch
scripts.test: node tests/shared.test.js && node tests/parsing.test.js && node tests/integration.test.js && node tests/components.test.js && node tests/power.test.js
